title: Behavioral Evidence, Values, Equity, and Accessible Hiring · Opportunity Brief: Conflict Accountability
summary: A candidate memorizes heroic stories, erases collaborators, blames others, performs culture fit, and assumes every hiring task is equally accessible or lawful everywhere. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the conflict accountability increment in behavioral evidence and access response bank. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony.
Choose a specific relevant situation and explain context, responsibility, action, decision, observable result, reflection, and transfer limit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Conflict Accountability · Theory Conflict Accountability
steps.instruction:
theory case — Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Conflict Accountability contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Conflict Accountability · Theory Conflict Accountability.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony. For Predict Conflict Accountability · Theory Conflict Accountability, keep Conflict Accountability connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Conflict Accountability condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

hints: For Predict Conflict Accountability · Theory Conflict Accountability, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Conflict Accountability precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. For Predict Conflict Accountability · Theory Conflict Accountability, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Leadership stories require the candidate to be the sole decision maker.

options.text: Leadership stories require the candidate to be the sole decision maker. That claim fails the predict conflict accountability evidence boundary for Conflict Accountability.

For predict conflict accountability, apply Conflict Accountability without its stated preconditions, omit the behavioral evidence and access response bank trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Conflict Accountability for behavioral evidence and access response bank.
Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Conflict Accountability while producing behavioral evidence and access response bank.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The worked example variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony. A defensible solution applies Conflict Accountability, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to behavioral evidence and access response bank.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-conflict-accountability — Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-conflict-accountability
decision-evidence: Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Leadership stories require the candidate to be the sole decision maker. This fails the Conflict Accountability contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions (U.S. federal guidance reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony.
